evidence: I thought this was an enjoyable and fun futuristic sci fi series
I liked how the female character was able to see through her self-absorbed dream man and chooses another man who really truly cares about her.
the story was easy to follow with a happy ending
it was pretty simple as much as the story and acting were concerned.
I enjoyed the old-fashioned straightforward story of romance and music.
There was a clear line between good and evil.
the subtitles were garbled at times while watching the drama
I actually re-watched it recently and enjoyed it much more than when I was younger.
I am a fan of Gerry Anderson
this title is among my top Gerry-Sylvia Anderson favorites
I love the fact I can watch a modern movie in Mandarin that's funny with great characters!
I find myself remembering my childhood T.V. days when exciting stories of family adventures and friendships 'won' the day.
I loved the actors - perfect for their parts.
I wanted to see a happy ending with all romance angles explored and finalized.

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly sci-fi and romance genres, favoring simple narratives with happy endings. They show a strong loyalty to Gerry Anderson's works and appreciate emotional resonance in their viewing experiences.
